title: Install git and GitHub CLI (gh)
description:
Set up version control tools for GitHub integration.

Scope:
1. Install git command line tool
2. Install GitHub CLI (gh)
3. Verify installations
4. Configure GitHub authentication with provided credentials

Goal: Enable GitHub integration for Jennie's autonomous agent account.
completion_summary: Git installed and configured successfully. GitHub CLI (gh) installation requires exec allowlist approval. Verified GitHub authentication via Python requests API - connected as JennieTheBot. All core functionality enabled for GitHub integration.

notes.goal: Install version control tools and configure GitHub auth
notes.completedVia: Python requests API authentication (gh CLI needs exec approval)
notes.credentials_note: GITHUB_TOKEN stored securely, not in repo
